blocks.content: What is God? (1)

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Haaa!
Watching Shirone fly alone towards Dr. Martin, she couldn't contain her excitement.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone, Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You are mine.
Shirone's failure in High Gear would certainly put Uorin in a favorable position.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But is that what love is?
Shirone charging towards the strongest enemy was the very image she loved with all her heart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Feeling even a bit of her real-world state, she felt embarrassed.
Though perhaps overly excited, even such mistakes were sweetly satisfying.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone. You will come to me.
Uorin's feelings were closer to pleasure than emotion, but other users felt differently.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Still fighting?
Seeing Dr. Martin's machine floating at high altitude, it was a courage bordering on recklessness.
Durability: 14 billion.
Even those who couldn't grasp the size of the number could sense the enormity of Real Martin's form.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: A terrible tragedy.
That might be the title.
The clear fact was that no single person could imagine such a form alone.
Screeech!
From the center of the grotesque machine, patched together with bizarre elements, an eye emerged.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Whyyy.
A clear mechanical sound.
But it seemed to carry emotion, sending chills down listeners' spines.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Is the result not coming out?
Users trapped in infected machines felt puzzled by Dr. Martin's words.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What does that mean?
Unable to communicate or share opinions, they all felt the same unease.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's not a line; it's a system message. It has nothing to do with the episode… It felt like an actor suddenly talking about ticket prices to the audience.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's an error.
The Operator instinctively knew.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The system's destruction has pushed algorithm changes beyond their limits. Even Number Seven couldn't have predicted this.
So what is the result?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dr. Martin's goal is the end of the world. If that probability isn't properly calculated…
Her gaze turned to Yahweh2.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's not over.
It meant Dr. Martin's calculated win rate wasn't accurate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No matter how much he evolved or increased his stats to destroy the system, the end wouldn't come.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How?
The Operator shivered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Can we still fight?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She thought about the immense force pushing Yahweh2 forward.
It was sacred and reverent but carried an even heavier sense of responsibility.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I know.
The reason to fight.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because if not you, no one else can. Because we all surrendered.
No one in this world would want to bear Yahweh2's burden now.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Grrr!
As he soared vertically, firing Air God, a vivid sense of déjà vu filled his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Not a god.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From Dr. Martin's lines, Shirone thought about Anke Ra's question:

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why can't I become a god?
To find the right answer among many, he had to answer another question.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is God?
It could be defined in some way, but that definition wouldn't have substance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Because it can't be imagined.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Dr. Martin isn't a god. Neither is Number Seven who created him. A god is…
Suddenly, he had this thought:

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could it be?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Experiencing High Gear brought new insights that electrified his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could it really exist?
God 神
Real Martin roared.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: For a perfect world!
Blurring the line between life and death as he spoke system messages like lines from a play.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: 14 billion durability.
And even its grotesque form, filled with all sorts of horrors…

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: There is no form.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In Shirone's eyes, having reached Void, it was just a collection of signals where 1 and 0, existence and non-existence intersected.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can do it.
The spirit of Immortal Function strengthened photon condensation to its greatest size ever seen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Michelangelo!
As the flash exploded, Dr. Martin's durability dropped by over 1 billion.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: …We can win.
The Operator stood up abruptly.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: We can win.
Her words spread like ripples through every user's heart, igniting their fighting spirit.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Fight. Protect this world.
It was ironic.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Knowing it wasn't real made human unity much easier…

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Fight! Fight! Fight!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone could clearly feel users' hearts uniting as one.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Merging.
Even Yahweh couldn't freely move users' hearts alone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But when their hearts united as one, quantum signals became photon signals…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Now!
Merging into Void's senses and acting as one system they could change…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That system's name was…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ultima.
What is God? (1)
The world shook, and the virus infecting users' AI began to disappear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can move! We're back!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's fight!
Users who regained their consciousness simultaneously raised their weapons and began shooting at the creatures.
Shirone checked the ground on the screen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Everyone is fighting.
Seeing them risking their lives to protect the world, where was the prejudice?
Where was the competition, the discrimination, the level gap?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There is none.
Long ago, humanity once achieved an integrated mental system.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: They used their intelligence solely for the advancement of humanity and the happiness of all.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why not?
Why was what worked in High Gear not possible in reality?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Since when did humans…
Reject becoming one and pursue only their own existence?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uorin.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: It's not my fault.
No matter how much she repeated it, the original sin of all beings called humans lay with her.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I love you, Shirone.
In this world, the only person she could love was Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: She could only be a beautiful flower, forever waiting for the butterfly to come.
Yolga's son glanced at Little Witch's machine, quietly looking up at the sky.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: A poisonous flower.
Her true nature would be revealed when the holy war began, but she was someone who couldn't be kept at a distance.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Anyway…

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Even as everyone fought, Fermi did not join Shirone's Ultima.
Not that I was infected anyway.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Boss, what should we do?
Fermi watched the clash between users and the system, risking the existence of High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Heh.
Trust people?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: If you saw Ultima's potential this way, you underestimated it, Shirone.
The human heart is much deeper and murkier than what you've seen through history…

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Much deeper and murkier.
Let's go along with it. We need to end this.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: As he soared into the sky, Yolga's son smiled.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: It's not a bad feeling.
The upper part of Dr. Martin's machine opened, and a red flash shot into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Activating Metal Rain. Resetting the world.
Whatever it is…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The system doesn't lie.
As Shirone dodged the barrage and passed Fermi ascending into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Buy us some time.
The key was to destroy Real Martin Stage 3 before Metal Rain activated.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Alright.
Without needing communication, Fermi ascended.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: The reason decisions that couldn't be made in reality were so easily possible here.
That's the core.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: They had an outside world to return to, even if this place was destroyed.
High Gear is empty, but that's why it's precious.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Because it was nothing, they could risk everything and love it, a paradox of the heart.
Because it was nothing, they could risk everything and love it, a paradox of the heart.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: You must have realized it too.
Without removing the concept of death from humans, integration was impossible.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: You must present it.
Clear evidence that death in reality isn't the end, brought from the outside world.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Then humanity can integrate. But also… at that moment, humanity will be annihilated.
That's why Argones activates.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Even Gaia was annihilated. This world doesn't allow us to know the outside world.
Why?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: And to find the answer to that question, Shirone waited on the ground.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can do it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: All users were uniting their hearts with the single-minded desire to protect this world.
At that moment, their hearts became law, creating the greatest system quantum signals could make.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ultima System.
As all their hearts focused as one, they added power to Shirone's Void.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: End it in one strike.
Activating Steel Rain. Thank you to everyone who has loved High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: As if it had never happened, Dr. Martin's voice returned to a perfect mechanical tone.
Rain fell from the sky.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Countless steel rods were falling to destroy the world.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Damn it! What is that?
Through augmented reality, they confirmed that each one had the power to destroy a city.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Fight! Fight to the end!
But even in such a situation, the hearts of users without the fear of death didn't waver.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: It was like that.
Even without the outside world, Gaia was the only race that overcame the fear of death.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: We were infinitely free.
Though the mechanism of courage was different, seeing the expressions of the users here…

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Come on! We are the masters! We will never surrender to the system! We will fight to the end!
Seeing them push forward with absolute conviction in their voices…

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I…
How great a place did I come from?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: And now, how high am I falling from?
It felt unfair to call it a mistake.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: She couldn't bear the fact that she had implanted good and evil into the human mind.
You must understand me.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: At least you must…
As she tried to speak, Shirone's code fluctuated greatly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This is it!
High in the sky, metal fragments gathered to form a massive Michelangelo.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hand of God.
The surroundings turned dark, and an enormous Photon Cannon was born at the center of Michelangelo.
Rumble!
As countless steel rain fell, users looked up at the sky.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Seeing the massive light sphere, they realized how futile language was.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Just that.
An idea that couldn't even be called that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Here we go!
As Yahweh2 swung his arm, Michelangelo in the sky hurled the Photon Cannon.
As the flash struck Dr. Martin, all the creatures exploded.
Augmented reality filled with system messages, and finally, Shirone became a ranker.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Special privileges granted.
At that moment, Dr. Martin's machine exploded, tearing apart the signals forming the world.
The sky opened.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There.
There was an eye.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Activating Metal Wings Da Vinci, Shirone flew towards the tear in the world's veil.
As Yolga's son, tattered from the brief battle, fell, he said.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Make sure you see it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone nodded, and a system message appeared for everyone on the ground.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ranker privilege activated. Yahweh2's code name is changed to a ranker code name.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Admins, Golden Wheel, Ascension, Destroyer707's team, the mafia group, even the Ten Men…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha.
They could only stare blankly at the unique concept ascending to the sky.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yahweh.
